items.name: Dark Wash Denim Shorts
items.description:
Classic high-waisted denim shorts in a deep indigo tone. Slightly frayed for a casual, laid-back vibe — ideal for urban, indie, or skater-inspired avatars. Pairs perfectly with crop tops, hoodies, or oversized tees for a trendy aesthetic look.

🔗 https://www.roblox.com/communities/33000260/GMARI#!/about

items.name: ARCHIVE - Y2K Arcade Party Sweater ( White )
items.description:
A loud throwback to pixel screens and late-night arcade chaos.
The Arcade Party Y2K Sweater features an oversized silhouette covered in playful glitch graphics, smiley icons, anime-inspired visuals, and retro game energy on a clean black base.

Built for bold fits, baggy styling, and full Y2K expression.
Made to stand out and dominate every server.
Available in other colors.

items.description:
[ SCORCH // LUMINA PINK SWEATPANTS DROP ]
Level up your lower fit with the SCORCH Lumina Pink Y2K Sweatpants Loose. This signature silhouette delivers the ultimate premium baggy streetwear vibe. Featuring a creamy lumina pink base with custom artistic gradients to match the collection. Designed for a high-end urban aesthetic and maximum comfort.

[ MATCHING SET ]
Complete the look! This item is designed to pair perfectly with the SCORCH Lumina Pink Y2K Hoodie Boxy. Find the matching hoodie in our store for the full elite Y2K set!
